Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x21A0 "COSMICCAUSEWAY-07DF-21A0" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $07df dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Cosmic Causeway (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Moved some init code from $011D to $07DF to ensure it was above the dump start address of $0400.
